title: Theme Controller Extraction

checks.detail: Theme shell controller exists under js/platform/shell.
app.js imports the extracted controller through an explicit relative ESM import.
Theme initialization remains in the app shell composition root.
Theme storage and DOM mutation implementation moved out of app.js.
Theme controller exposes the agreed public API.
Theme storage access remains guarded for private-mode/browser restrictions.
New runtime module is included in the offline precache surface.
app.js line count reduced from 616 to 589.

next: 37C.3 settings-controller preparation or next low-risk shell extraction after browser smoke confirmation.
